overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt exploring a medieval coastal village at dusk. The character walks from the village center through narrow paths between stone cottages, emerges onto a foggy harbor, explores a wooden dock, and continues along the shoreline past beached boats and villagers.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval village center with stone cottages and timber houses

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through narrow village paths between stone cottages and wooden fences

notable_agents.action: child standing near wooden fence watching the character pass by

entered.detail: stone building with wooden roof and warm interior light glowing from windows
steeply pitched roof made of straw or reeds on village building
rough-hewn timber fence lining the dirt path
burning fire in metal brazier providing warm orange light
unpaved earthen trail winding between village buildings

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow medieval village center at dusk, passing stone cottages with thatched roofs and wooden fences. Warm firelight from braziers contrasts with the cool overcast sky as the character moves along dirt paths between buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal harbor approach with view of sailing vessels and wooden docks

events.description: exits enclosed village center into open harbor view with water and boats visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking toward the waterfront as the harbor and sailing ships come into view ahead

notable_agents.action: villager walking ahead on the path toward the docks

entered.detail: calm water surface of the harbor with mist hovering above
medieval sailing vessel with square sail anchored in the harbor
weathered wooden pier extending into the harbor water
tall evergreen trees framing the harbor view

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up as the character leaves the village center and approaches the harbor. Wooden docks extend into the misty water where sailing ships are anchored, and pine trees frame the coastal view. The ground remains dirt trail as the character moves toward the waterfront.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden fishing pier extending into misty harbor water

events.description: character stops at end of pier and pans camera to survey the harbor, boats, and surrounding village

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden dock then stopping to observe the harbor, turning to view the village shoreline and distant mountains

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks of the dock surface with rope coils and mooring posts
coiled rope lying on the dock surface near the edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks out onto a wooden pier extending into the misty harbor, the planks creaking underfoot. At the end of the dock, the character stops and surveys the scene—sailing ships anchored in the foggy water and the village sprawling along the shoreline. The camera pans to take in the panoramic view of the harbor and distant forested mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky shoreline with beached fishing boats and dock activity

events.description: steps off wooden dock onto gravel shoreline and continues along the water's edge past beached boats

agents.ego_description: walking along the rocky beach past beached boats and groups of villagers, approaching a populated dock area

notable_agents.action: bearded villager sitting on dock edge repairing fishing nets
dog walking along the shoreline near the water

entered.detail: wooden fishing boat pulled up on the gravel shore with oars inside
wooden crates and barrels stacked near the dock entrance
rocky and gravel beach path along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: Leaving the pier, the character walks along a gravel shoreline where fishing boats are pulled up on the beach. The fog thickens over the water as the character passes villagers and a dog wandering the shore, eventually approaching a second wooden dock where more people are gathered around beached vessels.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate, firelit corridors of a medieval village center out toward a vast, misty coastal harbor. It begins by weaving through narrow dirt paths between thatched-roof stone cottages, where the warm glow of braziers contrasts with a cool, overcast dusk. As the character leaves the village center, the environment opens up into a harbor scene where pine trees frame a view of sailing ships anchored in the fog. The camera then follows the character out onto a creaking wooden pier to survey a panoramic vista of the foggy water and distant forested mountains before turning back toward the land. Finally, the scene shifts to a gravel shoreline, moving past beached fishing boats and wandering villagers as the fog thickens over the water toward a second gathering of people by the docks.
